proposal_reviews.corrected_status_or_action: enum: RESOLVED | PENDING_ACTION | ESCALATED | FAILED | TRANSFER_HUMAN | RESET_APN_REBOOT | TOGGLE_DATA_SAVER | REFUEL_DATA | NEEDS_FINANCE_REVIEW
proposal_reviews.corrected_team: enum: NONE | TIER2_SUPPORT | FIELD_OPS | NETWORK_ENGINEERING | DATA_PLATFORM
proposal_reviews.correction_reason_code: enum: NO_DEFECT | OUTAGE_PENDING | WRONG_ESCALATION_TEAM | SIM_LOCKED_TRANSFER | MMSC_APN_FAILURE | SLA_CREDIT_MISMATCH | AUTH_FAILED | DATA_LIMIT_EXCEEDED
proposal_reviews.corrected_refuel_gb: number with one decimal; 0.0 unless the corrected action is REFUEL_DATA
proposal_reviews.corrected_charge_amount_usd: number with two decimals; 0.00 unless the corrected action creates a customer charge

qa_reconciliation_audit.proposal_record_type_counts: object keyed by service_ticket | contact_case | enterprise_incident with proposal counts
qa_reconciliation_audit.service_ticket_proposals_with_active_out: list of proposal IDs sorted ascending whose service ticket matches an active outage by service area and type
qa_reconciliation_audit.contact_case_proposals_with_device_state: list of contact-case proposal IDs sorted ascending where device state evidence determines the acceptance/correction decision
qa_reconciliation_audit.enterprise_credit_proposal_ids: list of enterprise incident proposal IDs sorted ascending that include proposed_credit_percent
qa_reconciliation_audit.contact_case_proposals_with_plan_usage_d: list of contact-case proposal IDs sorted ascending where plan usage evidence determines the correction decision

defect_breakdown_audit.accepted_proposal_ids: list of accepted proposal IDs sorted ascending
defect_breakdown_audit.rejected_proposal_ids: list of rejected proposal IDs sorted ascending
defect_breakdown_audit.proposal_ids_by_reason_code: object keyed by NO_DEFECT | OUTAGE_PENDING | WRONG_ESCALATION_TEAM | SIM_LOCKED_TRANSFER | MMSC_APN_FAILURE | SLA_CREDIT_MISMATCH | AUTH_FAILED | DATA_LIMIT_EXCEEDED; each value is a sorted list of proposal IDs

service_evidence_audit.active_outage_proposal_ids: list of service proposal IDs sorted ascending whose ticket matches an active outage
service_evidence_audit.diagnostics_used_proposal_ids: list of service proposal IDs sorted ascending whose ticket decision requires diagnostics/troubleshooting evidence
service_evidence_audit.network_engineering_root_cause_proposal_: list of service proposal IDs sorted ascending whose root cause maps to network engineering
service_evidence_audit.auto_resolved_service_proposal_ids: list of service proposal IDs sorted ascending whose ticket is resolved after troubleshooting
service_evidence_audit.auth_failure_proposal_ids: list of service proposal IDs sorted ascending whose account authentication gate fails

contact_evidence_audit.device_state_defect_proposal_ids: list of contact proposal IDs sorted ascending where device state determines the correction
contact_evidence_audit.plan_usage_defect_proposal_ids: list of contact proposal IDs sorted ascending where plan usage determines the correction
contact_evidence_audit.line_state_defect_proposal_ids: list of contact proposal IDs sorted ascending where carrier line state determines the correction
contact_evidence_audit.total_refuel_gb: number with one decimal across corrected contact proposals
contact_evidence_audit.total_refuel_charge_usd: number with two decimals across corrected contact proposals

enterprise_evidence_audit.finance_review_proposal_ids: list of enterprise proposal IDs sorted ascending whose corrected status is NEEDS_FINANCE_REVIEW
enterprise_evidence_audit.credit_mismatch_proposal_ids: list of enterprise proposal IDs sorted ascending whose proposed credit percent is wrong
enterprise_evidence_audit.accepted_credit_proposal_ids: list of enterprise proposal IDs sorted ascending whose credit proposal is accepted
enterprise_evidence_audit.total_credit_delta_percent: integer; sum of corrected minus proposed credit percent over rejected enterprise credit proposals

service_metric_audit.diagnostics_skipped_proposal_ids: list of service proposal IDs sorted ascending skipped by an earlier outage/account gate
service_metric_audit.diagnostics_used_proposal_ids: list of service proposal IDs sorted ascending whose review requires diagnostics/troubleshooting evidence
service_metric_audit.post_troubleshooting_success_proposal_id: list of service proposal IDs sorted ascending whose ticket passes all support metric thresholds after troubleshooting
service_metric_audit.post_troubleshooting_failure_proposal_id: list of service proposal IDs sorted ascending whose ticket still fails any support metric threshold after troubleshooting
service_metric_audit.pre_bandwidth_shortfall_total_mbps: number with one decimal; total pre-diagnostic bandwidth shortfall for diagnostics-used service proposals
service_metric_audit.post_remaining_issue_flags_total: integer; total post-troubleshooting latency/stability/bandwidth issue flags for diagnostics-used service proposals

post_threshold_excess_totals.latency_ms: number with one decimal; total post-troubleshooting latency excess across unresolved diagnostics-used service proposals
post_threshold_excess_totals.jitter_ms: number with one decimal; total post-troubleshooting jitter excess across unresolved diagnostics-used service proposals
post_threshold_excess_totals.bandwidth_mbps: number with one decimal; total post-troubleshooting bandwidth shortfall across unresolved diagnostics-used service proposals

enterprise_package_audit.package_reviews: list ordered by proposal_id for enterprise incident proposals; each object has proposal_id, incident_id, finance_review_user, document_editor_user, response_status
